app.name: CueKeeper
app.one_sentence_promise: Run a live event from your iPhone without losing the sequence, timing, or backup plan.
app.target_user: Wedding planners, stage managers, DJs, MCs, and small production operators running events without expensive show-control software.
app.painful_moment: The event is live, timing is slipping, and someone needs a reliable run-of-show tool that still works offline.
app.why_different: Designed for live execution under pressure, not static planning or generic to-do lists.
app.why_users_pay: A single avoided live-event mistake is worth the subscription for professionals and serious operators.
app.subscription_model: Free for simple single-event runs; premium for unlimited events, cue templates, contingency plans, advanced timing features.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Event timelines, cue lists, role assignments, timing controls, contingency notes, offline run mode on-device — scoped to a single operator, not a synced team.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Team sync, remote cue sharing, client-facing run sheets, multi-device coordination — explicitly deferred, not required for v1 value.
core_workflows: Run cues in live mode with timing support
Adjust and recover when the plan shifts
ios_native_features: App Intents for quick event start
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: No LLM, AR, or ML required; the product wins on execution reliability.
app.design_direction: High-contrast operational UI that stays elegant but favors legibility and fast recovery under pressure.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a premium live event operations app with clock-aware run mode, strong cue hierarchy, big-touch controls, graceful contingency handling.
app.app_store_positioning: An offline-first run-of-show app for people who cannot afford chaos during live events.
key_risks: Must feel faster and more trustworthy than a printed run sheet
Live mode interaction design has to be extremely clear
Must stay genuinely useful as a single-operator tool, not silently assume multi-device coordination
app.invalidation_criteria: If the live run mode is not obviously better than Notes or a PDF schedule, the app should be cut.
app.v1_build_scope: Single-user event runner with timeline builder, cue execution mode, timers, contingency notes, templates, onboarding, paywall, accessibility, offline verification.
